Localization.Description: A project branch is created or removed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed branch "{object.name}" of the project "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created branch "{object.name}" from branch "{object.value}" of the project "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create a branch of the project "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove branch "{object.name}" of the project "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
